description: Fix8 is a UK-based functional beverage brand focused on naturally fermented, probiotic sparkling drinks. Founded by Freya Twigden, Fix8 produces kombucha and (from 2025) water kefir made with real fruit, science-backed probiotic cultures and added Vitamin C. Products are marketed as low-calorie, plant-based, vegan, gluten-free and with no added sugar. The brand sells canned and bottled drinks through national retailers, online direct-to-consumer, and foodservice accounts.
industry: Food & Beverage — Functional sparkling/probiotic beverages (kombucha, water kefir)
additional_context: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Flavoured Sparkling Water, Sparkling Water, Fizzy Drinks, Soft Drinks, Vinegar Drinks
archetype_affinity: Fix8 is primarily positioned as a functional, ingredient-led beverage brand whose kombucha and upcoming water kefir products strongly appeal to health- and ingredient-conscious consumers. description: UNAI is a UK-crafted adaptogenic soft drinks brand producing low-sugar, all-natural lightly sparkling beverages infused with nootropics and adaptogens including Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Reishi and Ashwagandha. Founded by childhood friends reconnected through a shared love of music and the outdoors, the brand is built around 'conscious connection' — helping consumers pause, connect and stay grounded. Products are 100% natural with no artificial flavours.
additional_context: Two-product range: UPLIFT (Pink Grapefruit & Strawberry with Lion's Mane + Cordyceps for focus/energy) and UNWIND (Lemon & Lavender with Reishi + Ashwagandha for relaxation/sleep). Sold DTC at £29.95 per 12-pack with 15% subscription discount. Also available at RAYE Store pop-up in Notting Hill. Brand hosts experiential events (hikes, cold plunge sessions) emphasising conscious connection.
archetype_affinity: UNAI's strongest alignment is with Wellness Seekers, who are drawn to the functional mushroom and adaptogen ingredients (Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Reishi, Ashwagandha) and the brand's low-sugar, all-natural formulation. Experience Explorers connect with the brand's experiential events (hikes, cold plunges) and novel ingredient combinations (prickly pear, burdock root). Conscious Consumers appreciate the 100% natural, no-artificial-flavours positioning and the mindfulness-centred brand ethos. The '...

description: Dalston's is a beverage company known for producing 'Soda With Soul,' which is full-flavor fizz made with real fruit and no added sugar or artificial sweeteners. The brand emphasizes sustainability, using recycled aluminum cans that are 100% recyclable. It was created by chefs in an East London nightclub.
archetype_affinity: Dalston's positions itself at the intersection of craft flavour, clean ingredients and sustainability: a chef-origin story, real fruit flavours, and recyclable aluminium cans define the brand. This makes it an exceptional match for Conscious Consumers and a strong fit for Wellness Seekers who value no added sugar and natural ingredients. research_overall_assessment: Dalston's is a legitimate and active brand known for its commitment to quality and sustainability in the beverage industry. With a strong online presence, active social media engagement, and positive community involvement, the brand is well-positioned in the market.
